.github/workflows/build.yml.general_idea: Update the GitHub Actions workflow to use JDK 11 instead of JDK 8 for the build environment.

.github/workflows/publish.yml.general_idea: Update the GitHub Actions workflow to use JDK 11 instead of JDK 8 for the build environment.

pom.xml.general_idea: Update the Java version property from 8 to 11 to target the new JDK.
pom.xml.why_exists: Without this change, the project continues to compile against Java 8, failing to utilize Java 11 features or enforce compatibility with the target runtime.

pom.xml.general_idea: Correct the Maven compiler source property to use the standard version number 11 instead of the invalid 1.11.
pom.xml.why_exists: The value '1.11' is not a valid Java version string for the maven-compiler-plugin, which would cause a build failure or fallback to default behavior; '11' is the correct identifier for Java 11.

pom.xml.general_idea: Correct the Maven compiler target property to use the standard version number 11 instead of the invalid 1.11.
pom.xml.why_exists: The value '1.11' is not a valid Java version string for the maven-compiler-plugin, which would cause a build failure or fallback to default behavior; '11' is the correct identifier for Java 11.
